headline: Will Tyson Foods' (TSN) CEO Transition Reshape Its Balance Between Chicken Strength and Beef Pressures?
summary: Tyson Foods has announced that longtime board member Jeffrey K. Schomburger, a former Procter & Gamble executive, will assume the roles of president and CEO on October 4, 2026, succeeding Donnie King, who is expected to remain on the board and support the transition. The appointment brings a leader with deep consumer brand and retail customer expertise into the top job at a time when Tyson is balancing strength in chicken against operating pressures in its beef business. Next, we’ll examine...
